description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3-eclipse-temurin-17 Docker image and caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository. Define variables MAVEN_CLI_OPTS set to '--batch-mode --errors --fail-at-end --show-version -DinstallAtEnd=true -DdeployAtEnd=true' and MAVEN_OPTS set to '-Dmaven.repo.local=.m2/repository -Dorg.slf4j.simpleLogger.log.org.apache.maven.cli.transfer.Slf4jMavenTransferListener=WARN -Dorg.slf4j.simpleLogger.showDateTime=true -Djava.awt.headless=true'. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. Add a validate job in the build stage that runs 'mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test-compile'. Add a test job in the test stage that runs 'mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test'. Add a verify job in the test stage that runs 'mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify' and is excluded from the master branch. Add a deploy job in the deploy stage that runs 'mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy -P ci-release -s ci/settings.xml' and runs only on the master branch.
